flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cambridge College fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (803 → 532).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Cambridge College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (591 vs 784).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cambridge College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $18.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cambridge College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $18.4k).
